warnings: Agent session is deterministic and local; it is not an autonomous external-agent run.
limitations: No external solver, external LLM, network, upload, tag, or release action was performed.

recommended_next_actions: Review the optical intent and selected design case.

Generate local workflow and adapter-preview artifacts only.
user_goal: Plan a local thin film coating preview with no external solver.
design_case_summary: thin_film_coating example-backed thin film coating preview

plan_steps.title: Interpret optical goal
plan_steps.description: Translate the natural language goal into thin film coating preview.
plan_steps.description_zh: 将自然语言目标转换为 thin film coating preview。
plan_steps.safety_note: No external LLM is called by default.

plan_steps.title: Select design case
plan_steps.safety_note: Examples are local preview cases only.

plan_steps.title: Suggest materials
plan_steps.description: Use the local preview material catalog for candidate materials.
plan_steps.description_zh: 使用本地预览材料库生成候选材料。
plan_steps.safety_note: Material data is preview/design-assist, not production-grade optical constants.

plan_steps.title: Review geometry
plan_steps.description: Identify the geometry family and missing geometry fields.
plan_steps.description_zh: 识别几何类型并标出缺失几何字段。
plan_steps.safety_note: Geometry remains a scaffold until reviewed.

plan_steps.title: Recommend adapter
plan_steps.description: Choose an open-source-first adapter path: preview-only; future TMM adapter candidate.
plan_steps.description_zh: 选择开源优先的适配器路径：preview-only; future TMM adapter candidate。
plan_steps.safety_note: No proprietary solver is required by default.

plan_steps.title: Plan local workflow
plan_steps.description: Plan parse, validate, preview, evidence, and human review steps.
plan_steps.description_zh: 规划解析、验证、预览、证据和人工审阅步骤。
plan_steps.safety_note: No solver is executed by default.

plan_steps.title: Preview artifacts and evidence
plan_steps.description: Prepare preview artifacts and validation evidence references.
plan_steps.description_zh: 准备预览产物和验证证据引用。
plan_steps.safety_note: No production-grade physical validation is claimed.

plan_steps.title: Check permission gates
plan_steps.description: Block solver, LLM, upload, publish, tag, and release actions by default.
plan_steps.description_zh: 默认阻断求解器、LLM、上传、发布、tag 和 release 动作。
plan_steps.safety_note: Formal convergence proof is not claimed.

warnings: Sub-agent collaboration is a deterministic local preview trace, not autonomous external agents.
limitations: No external LLM, external solver, network, upload, tag, or release action was performed.

recommended_next_actions: Open Agent Collaboration in the frontend.
agent_trace.design_goal: Plan a local thin film coating preview with no external solver.
agent_trace.timeline_summary: Example Gallery -> Material suggestions -> Adapter recommendation -> Agent trace timeline -> Workflow plan -> Artifact preview -> Evidence -> Next action

agents.role: Interprets user intent / spec and identifies missing fields.
agents.input_summary: Request classified as thin film coating.
agents.output_summary: Prepared a local preview intent summary for downstream agents.
diagnostics: Spec interpretation is deterministic and local.
recommended_next_actions: Review required wavelength, geometry, material, and output fields.
safety_notes: No external LLM was called for this preview trace.

agents.role: Suggests materials from the local preview material catalog.
agents.output_summary: Suggested preview materials: sio2, tio2, al2o3.
diagnostics: Material constants are preview/design-assist values only.
recommended_next_actions: Verify optical constants before physical conclusions.
safety_notes: Material suggestions are not production-grade optical constants.

agents.role: Identifies geometry family and required geometry fields.
agents.output_summary: Mapped the request to a preview geometry family and noted missing dimensions if any.
diagnostics: Geometry output is a scaffold until reviewed by the user.
recommended_next_actions: Confirm geometry dimensions, units, and boundary conditions.
safety_notes: Geometry remains a local preview scaffold.

agents.role: Recommends adapter/tool and explains maturity / limitations.
agents.input_summary: Application and material hints: thin film coating; sio2, tio2, al2o3.
agents.output_summary: Recommended adapter path: preview-only; future TMM adapter candidate.
diagnostics: Open-source-solver-first recommendation; no proprietary solver dependency.
recommended_next_actions: Use adapter preview before any optional solver execution.
safety_notes: No proprietary solver is required by default.

agents.role: Creates local preview workflow plan and ensures no solver by default.
agents.input_summary: Adapter path: preview-only; future TMM adapter candidate.
agents.output_summary: Proposed parse -> validate -> adapter preview -> human review workflow.
diagnostics: No solver execution is part of this trace.
recommended_next_actions: Inspect workflow plan and preview artifact before any manual execution.
safety_notes: No solver is executed by default.

agents.role: Attaches validation evidence / maturity and explains verified boundaries.
agents.input_summary: Adapter path: preview-only; future TMM adapter candidate.
agents.output_summary: Attached adapter maturity and validation-evidence references where available.
diagnostics: Evidence does not imply production-grade physical validation.
recommended_next_actions: Review validation reports and scope limitations.
safety_notes: No production-grade physical validation is claimed.

agents.role: Checks no overclaim and no default solver/LLM/publish/release actions.
agents.output_summary: Safety flags remain false; no solver, LLM, upload, tag, or release action.
diagnostics: Production-grade physical validation and formal convergence proof are not claimed.
recommended_next_actions: Keep preview and validation boundaries visible in the UI.
safety_notes: Formal convergence proof is not claimed.

agents.output_summary: Next step: load the example, validate spec fields, inspect materials, and preview the adapter artifact.
diagnostics: Recommendations are local workflow guidance only.
recommended_next_actions: Create an adapter preview without executing a solver.
safety_notes: Recommended next actions stay local and preview-first.

agent_trace.final_recommendation: Use sio2, tio2, al2o3 as preview material candidates and follow preview-only; future TMM adapter candidate; verify material constants and validation evidence before physical conclusions.

final_recommendation: Use the local thin_film_coating example-backed thin film coating preview path, inspect material candidates sio2, tio2, al2o3, then review any calculator preview, workflow plan, and adapter preview via preview-only; future TMM adapter candidate. Calculator outputs are design-assist only.
